Metadata.title: Frontend Developer Portfolio
Metadata.description: Modern portfolio landing page with a reusable dark background system.

firstScreen.name: Alexey Belov
firstScreen.stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js

about.title: About me
about.description: I’m a frontend developer with full-stack skills. My main focus is React, Next.js, and TypeScript, but I prefer to see the product as a whole: from interface and UX to backend logic, integrations, and deployment. I value clean solutions, thoughtful architecture, and interfaces that work well in real-world scenarios.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: I build modern interfaces with a focus on UX, performance, and clean component architecture. I care not only about how an application looks, but also how it feels in use: speed, clarity, interaction logic, and scalability.

backend.title: Backend
backend.stack: NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, REST API, Zod
backend.description: I design and develop the backend side of applications: APIs, business logic, database workflows, and data validation. My full-stack background helps me connect frontend and backend into a clear and reliable system.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.stack: Docker, Docker Compose, Nginx, VPS, Linux
deploy.description: I set up production environments, containerization, and deployment workflows. I understand how applications behave beyond local development: environment configuration, reverse proxy setup, healthchecks, build pipelines, runtime, and production support.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects where I worked on interfaces, architecture, and production-ready solutions.

sladkoru.title: Sladkoru
sladkoru.description: An e-commerce store for Turkish sweets that I built end-to-end: from design and frontend to backend, SEO architecture, and production deployment.
sladkoru.stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Docker, Nginx

dashboardPro.title: DJ-magaz
dashboardPro.description: An e-commerce store for DJ products that I built end-to-end with Next.js Pages Router and Strapi: from the frontend and catalog experience to CMS integration, server-side logic, and the overall project architecture.
dashboardPro.stack: Next.js, Strapi, TypeScript, Postgresql, Prisma, Tailwind

studioLanding.title: Oil market PD
studioLanding.description: An e-commerce store for motor oils where I worked on the frontend side of the product, building the user-facing experience and catalog interfaces with vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

logisticsPanel.title: Smart Engineer
logisticsPanel.description: A landing page for engineering services that I developed independently from start to finish using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with a focus on clear presentation, responsive layout, and a conversion-oriented page structure.

readability.title: The background stays textured, but the text field remains clean.
readability.description: Most of the visual depth lives near the edges and corners, while the central reading area remains quiet. This keeps large headings clear and body copy stable even when the page grows with real content.

principles.calm: Interfaces should feel calm, fast, and intentional.
principles.structure: Visual systems need enough structure to scale without looking rigid.
principles.accent: Accent color should guide attention, not replace hierarchy.

toolkit.title: The next step can consume this data inside one global renderer.
toolkit.description: Marker components do not draw anything themselves. They only expose coordinates, so the future background system can stay global and use these anchors as input.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Open to frontend and full-stack opportunities, project-based work, and thoughtful product collaborations. If you have a role, a project, or an idea to discuss, feel free to reach out.

DebugPanel.title: Collected document-level coordinates for the global background system.
